page: Microsoft Azure E104is_v5 is an isolated virtual machine instance belonging to the EISv5 server family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor running at 2.8 GHz, featuring 52 physical cores and 104 vCPUs via Hyper-Threading on an x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 672.0 GB of RAM, providing 6.46 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing high-performance external disk attachments.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core capabilities and high memory throughput. The server achieved a strong multi-core stress-ng score of 100,847.42 and a Passmark CPU score of 78,782.73. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, with read-only small block cached speeds reaching 5,424.77 GB/sec and large block uncached write speeds at 120.44 GB/sec. Cryptographic performance is a notable highlight, with the Passmark CPU encryption test placing in the top tier at 91,285.35. Single-core performance remains average, as shown by a Geekbench single-core score of 1,695.0.

This instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale database operations, and multi-threaded enterprise applications. It demonstrates strong performance in database operations with a score of 30,031.01 on Passmark and Redis SET operations reaching 90.58 million operations per second. However, due to the lack of a dedicated GPU, it is less suited for heavy LLM text generation, where it achieved a weak score of 2.65 tokens per second on large 70B models. The absence of local storage requires reliance on external premium storage options for data persistence.
description: Microsoft Azure E104is_v5 is an isolated, memory-optimized virtual machine from the EISv5 family, configured with 104 vCPUs and 672.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor at 2.8 GHz with 52 physical cores, this x86_64 instance delivers strong multi-core performance, as evidenced by a Passmark CPU score of 78,782.73 and a top-tier encryption score of 91,285.35. While it lacks local storage and dedicated GPUs, it is Premium Storage capable and features high memory bandwidth, reaching 308.31 GB/sec for uncached large block reads. This hardware profile makes the instance highly efficient for memory-intensive enterprise applications, large-scale database operations, and multi-threaded workloads. However, the lack of hardware acceleration limits its viability for large-scale LLM text generation.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E104is_v5 is an isolated EISv5 instance with 104 vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8370C CPU, delivering strong multi-core and database performance without local storage.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E104is_v5 is an isolated virtual machine with 104 vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and strong multi-core performance for database workloads.
tagline: An isolated, high-vCPU virtual machine with dense memory capacity and strong multi-core performance for demanding enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 104 dedicated vCPUs and 52 physical cores
672.0 GB of RAM optimized for memory-intensive enterprise applications
Strong multi-core performance and top-tier cryptographic encryption capabilities
Premium Storage capable configuration without local storage or bundled GPUs
Well-suited for large-scale database operations and high-throughput Redis deployments
